title: Das indische Grabmal
writer: Thea von Harbou, Richard Eichberg, Hans Klaehr
actors: Philip Dorn, Kitty Jantzen, La Jana
plot: Back in India after what happened at first part Der Tiger von Eschnapur, Maharadscha Chandra is ready to carry on his well-planned vengeance, in which German architect Peter Fürbringer, his fiancée Irene and his assistant will get...
